subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1912-10-10 in San Francisco
subcodes.first_line: I have received a letter from the friends in Persia, who send greetings to you. They long to see you, and their greatest desire is for the day to come
subcodes.subjects: @war and peace, @competition vs. cooperation; the struggle for existence, @limits of the intellect, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @love and unity, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all, @unity; oneness of humanity
